generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/dtdf"

instance RuntimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization for gantry crane motion control"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation capabilities for gantry crane dynamics"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction of gantry crane movement trajectories"
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Trajectory generation for optimal control of gantry crane movements"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data analysis for operational trends"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System validation for continuous verification of behavior"
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimal control of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryGenerationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging historical operational data",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for runtime visualization of data",
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for dynamic simulation of system behavior",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight, PredictionInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation of system behavior",
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization tool",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing operational data",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GantrylibPython : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library (gantrylib) for system control and data processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, SimulationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deployment",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT Broker for messaging between physical and virtual components",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for hardware interfacing",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for geometric representation",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System architecture modeling tool",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MkDocs : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Documentation tool for system documentation",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control system for digital twin code",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance ArduinoProcessedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoDataAcquisition
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors real-time wind speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoDataAcquisition : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Handles data acquisition and processing for sensors",
    DTDFVocab:producedData ArduinoProcessedDataTransmitted
]

instance OperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "All operational data stored in TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, ArduinoProcessedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Grafana
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model for motion simulation of the crane",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPython
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architecture visualization model for the Lab Scale Gantry Crane",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system designed for research and educational purposes, publicly available with freely available software, serving as a reproducible exemplar for validating digital twin methodologies including continuous validation, fault detection, and system evolution notation.",
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoDataAcquisition
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment LabScaleGantryCraneSystem
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are issued through the Human Machine Interface (HMI), processed by the Control Application (Python), and executed via the Physical Crane Interface. Specific command types, message formats, validation mechanisms, and execution confirmation details are not provided."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system uses the C4 Model for architecture visualization with context and container diagrams, employing containerization technologies for deployment and following an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT Broker is used for signaling between services including Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, and Continuous Validation Service. TimescaleDB serves as the data storage. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All software runs on a personal computer, and the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard C4 Containers are containerized with Docker. Specific computational and storage requirements, scalability mechanisms, and deployment models are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML standards are used for the digital twin model in the Air Quality Management exemplar, while the Lab Scale Gantry Crane employs the C4 Model for software architecture visualization."
]
